name: FIRST COMMUNITY CORP /SC/
summary: First Community Corp /SC/ is a bank holding company headquartered in South Carolina. Through its subsidiary bank, it provides commercial and retail banking services, including commercial real estate loans, commercial business loans, mortgage loans, and deposit products. The company focuses on lending to small to mid-sized community-based businesses and accepts brokered deposits as an additional funding source.
